name: Woven Zebra Accent Rug Black/Tan - Threshold™
description:
Add the perfect finishing touch to any indoor space with this Woven Zebra Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug features a zebra pattern on a woven backdrop in black and tan hues to elevate your space while blending effortlessly with a variety of decor styles. Easy to clean, this low-pile rug is highly versatile and suitable for high-traffic areas like your kitchen, living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
